item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p11","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer notices the repeated pattern of adding fields to downstream forms and partially moves upstream by naming the real issue as missing ownership/confirmation before key nodes. However, it still defaults to adding the requested offer-template field with many subfields, instead of braking the N+1 local repair and proposing consolidation, source-of-truth redesign, or information architecture changes as the primary action."}
